message.content:
@startuml
participant "用户信息正确请求URL" as User
participant "UrlFilterSecurityInterceptor" as Interceptor
participant "UrlMetadataSourceService" as MetadataSource
participant "UrlConfigAttribute" as ConfigAttribute
participant "UrlAccessDecisionManager" as DecisionManager

User -> Interceptor : Authentication Request
Interceptor -> MetadataSource : getAttributes(Object object)
MetadataSource -> ConfigAttribute : UrlConfigAttribute(HttpServletRequest httpServletRequest)
MetadataSource -> DecisionManager : decide(Authentication authentication, Object object, Collection<ConfigAttribute> configAttributes)
@enduml
